CustomField.description: Total secured liabilities from all attached Insolvency Accounts
CustomField.formula: IF(Client_Identifiers__c == 'Canaccede' || Client_Identifiers__c == 'Affirm', Null, CASE( $Profile.Name , 'SDA Community User', Secured_Claim_Amount_SDA__c , 'SDA Community User Readonly', Secured_Claim_Amount_SDA__c , 'SDA Login Community User', Secured_Claim_Amount_SDA__c , 'SDA Login Community User Readonly', Secured_Claim_Amount_SDA__c , 'SPL Community User', Secured_Claim_Amount_SPL__c, 'SPL Community User Readonly', Secured_Claim_Amount_SPL__c, 'SPL Login Community User', Secured_Claim_Amount_SPL__c, 'SPL Login Community User Readonly', Secured_Claim_Amount_SPL__c, 'Scotia Bank Community User', Secured_Claim_Amount_Scotia__c , 'Scotia Bank Community User Readonly', Secured_Claim_Amount_Scotia__c, 'Scotia Bank Login Community User', Secured_Claim_Amount_Scotia__c, 'Scotia Bank Login Community User Readonly', Secured_Claim_Amount_Scotia__c, 'Scotia SPL Common Login Community User Readonly', Secured_Claim_Amount_Scotia__c + Secured_Claim_Amount_SPL__c, 'Scotia SPL Common Community User Readonly', Secured_Claim_Amount_Scotia__c + Secured_Claim_Amount_SPL__c, Secured_Claim_Amount_SPL__c + Secured_Claim_Amount_Scotia__c + Secured_Claim_Amount_SDA__c))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Total secured liabilities from all attached Insolvency Accounts
CustomField.label: Total Secured Claim Amount
